raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California will switch to the less expensive winter blend of gasoline.",
    "Governor Newsom's announcement is seen as beneficial for drivers.",
    "California gas prices jumped 14 cents per gallon overnight.",
    "California’s statewide average gas price has surpassed $6 for only the third time in history.",
    "The difference between California gas prices and the national average is currently $2.19 per gallon.",
    "The gap in gas prices between California and the national average has widened by 81 cents since the signing of a law aimed at reducing prices.",
```
